---
title: "Anna Wilhelmina Fursdon"
---

## Anna Wilhelmina Fursdon

**Dates:** (1856-1936)

### Description

sister of Charlotte and Henrietta Fursdon

### Biography

Sixth daughter of the Rev. Edward Fursdon, she was evidently not a member of the Gosling Society. [LG 1952 Fursdon]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
